report.summary: Community growth cycle v26: Stablecoin Yield Strategies + DeFAI Guide social campaigns (high-signal pages with zero prior social coverage); Mon Mar 16 'Week Ahead' anchor tweet (FOMC T-2, tax 30d, Pectra 25d); Tue Mar 17 Pectra countdown tweet; Thu-Fri Mar 27-28 calendar gap filled; newsletter amendments for Thu Mar 20; 2 new social cards created.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet (Mon Mar 16 PM): Week Ahead anchor — FOMC Wednesday, 30 days to tax deadline, 25 days to Pectra, stablecoin yield spreads widening; CTAs to DCA calculator + portfolio tracker

Twitter thread (Thu Mar 27 AM, 5 posts): Stablecoin Yield Strategies — '$180B+ in stablecoins earning 0%'; Aave 4-8%, Morpho 6-12%, Pendle 8-20%, Ethena 15-25%, MakerDAO sDAI 5-8%; risk spectrum LOW→HIGH; 3 sample strategies by risk level; CTA to /learn/stablecoin-yield-strategies-2026
Tweet (Thu Mar 27 AM): Stablecoin Yield single — $180B idle, 5 protocols with APY ranges, CTA to guide

Twitter thread (Fri Mar 28 AM, 5 posts): DeFAI Guide — 'AI agents are coming to DeFi'; Autonolas $300M+ mcap, Spectral on-chain ML, Fetch.ai marketplace, Virtuals tradeable agents; use cases + risks (hallucinations with real money); CTA to /learn/defai-guide
Tweet (Fri Mar 28 AM): DeFAI single — 4 protocols to watch, opportunity + risk framing

Tweet (Tue Mar 17 AM): Ethereum Pectra 25-day countdown — EIP-7702 smart accounts, EIP-7251 validator consolidation, EIP-7691 blob throughput, EIP-2537 BLS precompile; CTA to /learn/ethereum-pectra-upgrade-guide
Newsletter amendments (Thu Mar 20): Stablecoin Yield Strategies + DeFAI Guide added to NEW ON DEGEN0X section; Degen Corner updated with DeFAI 'DeFi Summer 2020 moment' thesis

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-stablecoin-yield-strategies.svg — 1200x630 social card: dark theme with green/cyan/amber/red color coding by risk level; '$180B+ in Stablecoins Earning 0%' headline; 5 protocol cards (Aave, Morpho, Pendle, Ethena, MakerDAO) with APY ranges and risk bars; right panel with 3 strategy tiers (Conservative 5-7%, Balanced 8-12%, Aggressive 12-20%); degen0x brand bar. Saved to /public/social-stablecoin-yield-strategies.svg

social-defai-guide.svg — 1200x630 social card: purple-to-cyan gradient theme; 'DeFAI' hero title; AI agent node with capability connections (Trade Execution, Yield Optimization, Risk Management); 4 protocol cards (Autonolas $300M+ mcap, Spectral ML inference, Fetch.ai marketplace, Virtuals tradeable agents); warning chip 'AI hallucinations with real money'; degen0x brand bar. Saved to /public/social-defai-guide.svg

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: Stablecoin Yield Strategies: +92% signal — DeFi yield queries surge pre-FOMC as rate decisions directly impact yield appetite. $180B idle stablecoins is a compelling hook. Evergreen content with strong search intent. Zero social coverage until v26 despite being top-3 signal page.
DeFAI Guide: +89% signal — AI×crypto is the dominant narrative of 2026. Autonolas ($OLAS) at $300M+ mcap, Virtuals Protocol gaining mainstream coverage. Zero dedicated social thread until v26.

FOMC T-2 (Wed Mar 18): Week Ahead tweet frames degen0x as the 'crypto calendar' resource. Three converging events (FOMC + tax + Pectra) create natural hook. Rate limiter STILL 0/6 — endpoints unprotected for FOMC traffic spike.
Pectra countdown (25 days): Developer community engagement peaks 3-4 weeks before upgrades. EIP-7702 is the most user-facing change. Strong cross-link to existing coverage.
Tax season (30 days to Apr 15): Escalating urgency. Weekly countdown tweets continue through deadline.
348 pages live, 4 in queue. Calendar now filled through Fri Mar 28 with no posting conflicts.
Stablecoin yield social card saved to /public/social-stablecoin-yield-strategies.svg
